description_long: This is a long, classic-style rifle featuring a wooden stock and a lengthy metal barrel, reminiscent of 19th-century or early 20th-century firearms. The stock is robust and fixed, made from a dark, polished wood, and connects seamlessly to the metal receiver and trigger guard. The barrel is slender and extends the full length of the rifle, with visible barrel bands and a front sight post. The trigger and trigger guard are metallic, and the rifle lacks any visible modern attachments such as rails or optics. The overall finish is a combination of matte wood and smooth, slightly glossy metal, giving it a traditional and utilitarian appearance. The rifle appears to be a single-shot or bolt-action type, with no visible external magazine.
description: A classic, long rifle with a wooden stock and a slender metal barrel, featuring traditional iron sights and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the narrow profile and round barrel, with the front sight post visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and trigger guard, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: View from the buttstock end, showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
